summary: Asserts the exact 'e: edit slug' string in the real rendered #detail widget after opening the pane; fails today without the feature. Trailing-hint placement isn't pinned, but the pane body renders only task data (fixture contains no such string), so the assertion can't be satisfied except by an added key hint; note REQ-007.2.1's endswith test forces any added hint text off the final copy-hint line.
